query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of an elderly person wearing eyeglasses. The subject's face occupies most of the frame, with round glasses positioned across the bridge of the nose. Deep black shadow covers the left portion of the image, while the right side shows a lighter background. The subject's hair is visible along the sides of the face, and the eyes are looking directly toward the camera.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of an elderly person wearing eyeglasses, rendered with intentional blur and horizontal motion smearing that duplicates and stretches facial features outward from the center in a surreal, dreamlike distortion. Deep black shadow covers the left portion while a lighter background appears on the right, and the softened, uncanny presentation of the face evokes atmospheric distress.
